$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tag Loader component - a circular loading indicator/spinner used to show loading states. Supports multiple sizes (sm, md, lg) and theme variants (light, dark). Figma Reference: Node ID 396-34799

$component.name: Tag Loader
$component.description: A circular loading indicator component that displays an animated spinner ring. Used to indicate loading states in mobile interfaces. Features a circular ring with an animated segment that rotates continuously. Supports multiple sizes and theme variants for different contexts.
$component.structure: Circular ring shape with animated segment that rotates around the circumference. The ring consists of a track (base ring) and an active segment (highlighted portion).

sizes.sm: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 18px-20px
sizes.md: Medium size (commonly used default for mobile) - typically 20px-24px
sizes.lg: Large size for prominent mobile loading indicators - typically 24px-28px

variants.light: Light theme variant with white/light grey colors for use on dark backgrounds
variants.dark: Dark theme variant with darker grey/blue colors for use on light backgrounds

usage.contexts: Mobile loading states, data fetching indicators, async operation feedback, tag loading states, content loading indicators
usage.features: Circular ring spinner, Animated segment, Multiple sizes, Theme variants (light/dark), Continuous rotation animation

tag-loader.$comment: Tag Loader component tokens - circular loading indicator with animated segment

size.$comment: Size tokens for tag loader - defines the diameter of the circular loader

sm.description: Mobile tag loader size for sm - 20px diameter

md.description: Mobile tag loader size for md - 24px diameter

lg.description: Mobile tag loader size for lg - 28px diameter

stroke-width.$comment: Stroke width tokens for tag loader ring - defines the thickness of the circular ring

sm.description: Mobile tag loader stroke width for sm - 2px ring thickness

md.description: Mobile tag loader stroke width for md - 2.5px ring thickness

lg.description: Mobile tag loader stroke width for lg - 3px ring thickness

color.$comment: Color tokens for tag loader - includes track (base ring) and active (animated segment) colors for light and dark themes

light.$comment: Light theme variant - designed for use on dark backgrounds

track.description: Mobile tag loader light theme track color - base ring color - gray/500 - #667085

active.description: Mobile tag loader light theme active segment color - animated highlight - white/base - #ffffff

dark.$comment: Dark theme variant - designed for use on light backgrounds

track.description: Mobile tag loader dark theme track color - base ring color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

active.description: Mobile tag loader dark theme active segment color - animated highlight - gray/600 - #475467

animation.$comment: Animation tokens for tag loader - defines rotation speed and timing

duration.description: Mobile tag loader animation duration - time for one complete rotation - 1 second

timing-function.description: Mobile tag loader animation timing function - linear for continuous rotation

iteration-count.description: Mobile tag loader animation iteration count - infinite for continuous rotation
